score_breakdown.evidence: 415/415 tests pass and deterministic replay checks are green.
Bandit and dependency scans enabled in CI.
Benchmark suite present; regression thresholds need tighter class budgets.
Reference suite and manifest checks are automated.
SLO docs and runbooks exist; alert routing maturity still in progress.
Release checks and policy contracts are versioned.
Cross-language parity tests exist; broader integration docs still expanding.

risks.summary: Performance headroom is narrow under spike load.
risks.mitigation: Complete EPIC-02 profiling backlog and optimize top two hotspots.

risks.summary: Alert routing and MTTR telemetry are not yet fully automated.
risks.mitigation: Complete EPIC-05 dashboards and incident drill cadence.

actions.description: Reduce API p95 latency to <= 150 ms.
Automate SLO dashboard publication in CI.

notes: Baseline snapshot before M1 quality gate.
